findings.title: RDS instance publicly accessible
findings.message: db (db_instance) has Publicly Accessible enabled. RDS should never be internet-facing.
findings.fix: Disable Publicly Accessible in the component config.

findings.title: EC2 IMDSv2 not enforced
findings.message: web (instance) does not enforce IMDSv2. Set metadata tokens to required to prevent SSRF attacks.
findings.fix: Set IMDSv2 (Metadata Tokens) to required in the component config.

findings.title: RDS storage not encrypted
findings.message: db (db_instance) does not have storage encryption enabled.
findings.fix: Enable Storage Encrypted in the component config panel.

findings.title: RDS backup retention disabled
findings.message: db (db_instance) has backup retention set to 0. Set at least 7 days.
findings.fix: Set Backup Retention to 7 or more days in the component config.

findings.title: S3 bucket has no server-side encryption
findings.message: logs (s3_bucket) has no server-side encryption configured.
findings.fix: Set Server-Side Encryption to AES256 or aws:kms in the component config.

findings.title: S3 bucket missing Block Public Access
findings.message: logs (s3_bucket) does not have Block Public Access enabled.
findings.fix: Enable Block Public Access in the component config.

findings.title: No security group assigned
findings.message: web (instance) has no security group. Define explicit ingress/egress rules.
findings.fix: Open the Security tab and create or assign a security group to this component.

findings.title: Orphaned component — no connections
findings.message: web (instance) has no connections. Connect it or remove it.
findings.fix: Draw an edge from this component to a related resource, or delete it if no longer needed.

findings.title: No security group assigned
findings.message: app (instance) has no security group. Define explicit ingress/egress rules.
findings.fix: Open the Security tab and create or assign a security group to this component.

findings.title: Orphaned component — no connections
findings.message: app (instance) has no connections. Connect it or remove it.
findings.fix: Draw an edge from this component to a related resource, or delete it if no longer needed.

findings.title: No security group assigned
findings.message: db (db_instance) has no security group. Define explicit ingress/egress rules.
findings.fix: Open the Security tab and create or assign a security group to this component.

findings.title: Orphaned component — no connections
findings.message: db (db_instance) has no connections. Connect it or remove it.
findings.fix: Draw an edge from this component to a related resource, or delete it if no longer needed.

findings.title: Orphaned component — no connections
findings.message: logs (s3_bucket) has no connections. Connect it or remove it.
findings.fix: Draw an edge from this component to a related resource, or delete it if no longer needed.

findings.title: No security group assigned
findings.message: processor (lambda_function) has no security group. Define explicit ingress/egress rules.
findings.fix: Open the Security tab and create or assign a security group to this component.

findings.title: Orphaned component — no connections
findings.message: processor (lambda_function) has no connections. Connect it or remove it.
findings.fix: Draw an edge from this component to a related resource, or delete it if no longer needed.

findings.title: RDS deletion protection off
findings.message: db (db_instance) has no deletion protection. Enable it to prevent accidental drops.
findings.fix: Enable Deletion Protection in the component config.

findings.title: RDS instance not marked for reserved pricing
findings.message: db (db_instance) is not marked as a reserved instance. Reserved instances save 30-60% for production databases.
findings.fix: Enable Reserved Instance in the component config to document the intent.

findings.title: S3 bucket versioning disabled
findings.message: logs (s3_bucket) does not have versioning enabled. Enable it to protect against accidental deletes.
findings.fix: Enable Versioning in the component config.

findings.title: No CloudWatch monitoring
findings.message: web (instance) has no CloudWatch connection.
findings.fix: Add a CloudWatch component and connect it to this resource.

findings.title: No CloudWatch monitoring
findings.message: app (instance) has no CloudWatch connection.
findings.fix: Add a CloudWatch component and connect it to this resource.

findings.title: No CloudWatch monitoring
findings.message: db (db_instance) has no CloudWatch connection.
findings.fix: Add a CloudWatch component and connect it to this resource.

findings.title: Single AZ — no high availability
findings.message: db (db_instance) does not have Multi-AZ enabled. Enable it for production workloads.
findings.fix: Enable Multi-AZ in the component config.

findings.title: No CloudWatch monitoring
findings.message: processor (lambda_function) has no CloudWatch connection.
findings.fix: Add a CloudWatch component and connect it to this resource.

findings.title: Lambda function has no dead-letter queue
findings.message: processor (lambda_function) has no dead-letter queue. Failed async invocations will be silently dropped.
findings.fix: Add an SQS queue or SNS topic and connect it to this Lambda as a DLQ.
